div.p: Loading 8 floats into a 256-bit AVX register

g.text: particles[i].x += dt; // stride = 28 bytes → gather or scalar
xs[i] += dt; // stride = 4 bytes → vmovaps + vaddps

text.tspan: // vaddps ymm0, ymm0, ymm1 ; add 8 floats in parallel
// vaddps ymm0, ymm0, ymm1 ; add 8 floats in parallel
// particles[0]: x0 y0 z0 vx0 vy0 vz0 m0
// particles[1]: x1 y1 z1 vx1 vy1 vz1 m1
// particles[2]: x2 y2 z2 vx2 vy2 vz2 m2
// x values are STRIDED by 28 bytes!
// x0 at offset 0, x1 at offset 28, x2 at offset 56
// particles[0]: x0 y0 z0 vx0 vy0 vz0 m0
// particles[1]: x1 y1 z1 vx1 vy1 vz1 m1
// particles[2]: x2 y2 z2 vx2 vy2 vz2 m2
// x values are STRIDED by 28 bytes!
// x0 at offset 0, x1 at offset 28, x2 at offset 56
// x[]: x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5 x6 x7
// y[]: y0 y1 y2 y3 y4 y5 y6 y7
// x[]: x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5 x6 x7
// y[]: y0 y1 y2 y3 y4 y5 y6 y7
